projectDescription: Altarflow is the financial operating system for churches — tracking donations, expenses, and reports with AI agents that automate the back-office work of reconciliation, categorization, and Zelle matching.
keyFeatures: AI agents that automatically categorize expenses and match Zelle/Venmo donations to donors
Digital giving with Quick Give (Apple Pay, Google Pay, tap-to-give) and daily payouts
All-source donation tracking (digital, cash, Zelle, checks) in one dashboard
NFC tap tags for in-person giving — scan to open giving page from pews or welcome desk
Donor portal at donor.altarflow.com for giving history and year-end tax statements
Member CRM with auto-building profiles, custom fields, and family groupings
Drag-and-drop bilingual form builder (English and Spanish) with CRM auto-sync
Branded church web portal with engagement analytics — no website required
Fund accounting with real-time fund balances and restricted-dollar tracking
Board-ready financial reports exportable as PDF or CSV in seconds
Free 5-year data migration from ChurchTrac, Breeze, Tithely, QuickBooks
Native bilingual support in English and Spanish across every feature
publicApiSurface: Form builder with embed and share options
AI agents: transaction categorization, Zelle matching, budgeting (Scale plan)
WhatsApp notifications and AI chat (Scale plan)
